description: The Lynwood Vikings is a deputy gang within the Los Angeles County Sheriff's Department (LASD), formerly based at the Lynwood station. Composed of sworn deputy sheriffs, it has been described as a neo-Nazi, white supremacist gang engaged in racially motivated hostility. Members have been involved in police brutality and corruption, with tattoos symbolizing officer-involved shootings. The gang rose to prominence in the 1990s amid misconduct litigation.
